extracted_data.description:
Zerodha Kite is our flagship trading app for the share market. We serve over 1.6 crore customers across our platform, with active traders placing 2+ crore orders every day.

Invest in everything

• All stocks on NSE and BSE stock exchanges - trade NSE stock and BSE stock securities.
• Equity shares, government bonds, T-bills, SDLs, and Sovereign Gold Bonds.
• Apply for IPO, buybacks, rights issues, and OFS - IPOs with instant application facility.
• Build wealth through systematic share trading and delivery-based investing.

Account and Finance Tools

• Open demat account integrated with CDSL depositories for share holding.
• Track and analyze your portfolio with detailed analytics and market trading insights.
• Share trading with instant pledge facility for additional margin - pledge shares for leverage.
• Financial reports and statements for all investments - track charges, profits, and performance.
• Gift shares, ETFs, and bonds to your loved ones from your demat account.

Why Kite?

• Zero brokerage delivery investments in stocks, bonds, ETFs, IPOs, government bonds, and gold bonds (statutory charges applicable).
• Advanced trading tools including option chain, charting, F&O analytics, and investment research.
• Comprehensive tax-ready reports to track your portfolio and file taxes easily with complete financial statements.
• Free access to Zerodha's ecosystem products like Sensibull, Tijori, Streak, and Quicko for trading and investing.
• No gimmicks, spam, or annoying push notifications.

Trade in Stock Market

• Trade futures and options (F&O) like Nifty, Sensex, FinNifty, BankNifty on NSE and BSE exchanges.
• Intraday trading with advanced charting tools and real-time market live data for stock trading.
• Currency derivatives trading: Futures on USDINR, EURINR, JPYINR and GBPINR pairs, with options primarily available on USDINR.
• Option Chain with real-time option prices, IV, OI and OI change for option buying and option trading.
• Margin Trading Facility (MTF) to buy equity shares with leverage up to 5x for margin trading.
• Commodities derivatives trading on MCX including crude oil, gold, silver and more commodity contracts.

All tools you need to trade and invest

• Basket orders to place multiple trades across securities with real-time margin requirements for stock trading.
• Alerts for price movements on stocks, Nifty 50, and other securities.
• GTT orders for long-term positions up to one year - for investors who buy and hold equity.
• Option trading with iceberg orders to reduce impact costs in derivatives and futures options trading.
• Create SIPs on stocks and ETFs for systematic investing - start investing with as little as ₹500.
• Access NSE and  BSE markets across intraday, delivery, derivatives and FNO segments for market trading.
• Online trading with instant order execution across stock exchanges and segments.

Zerodha Universe products

• Sensibull for F&O option trading and derivatives analysis with advanced tools.
• Tijori for fundamental research and stock analysis.
• Streak for backtesting trading strategies.
• smallcase for thematic investing in stock baskets - invest in ideas, not just stocks.
• Quicko for tax filing - file taxes with integrated financial data.

Share market app with complete NSE stock, BSE stock and commodities access. Investors can invest, trade and manage their demat account. Whether you're into intraday trading, long-term investing, or futures options trading, Zerodha provides tools for stock market participation. Start your investment journey with Zerodha for online trading and investing.

Zerodha Broking Ltd. SEBI Registration no.: INZ000031633 Broker code: NSE 13906 | BSE: 6498 | MCX: 56550

Hi Zerodha Team, It would be extremely helpful if Kite could support trailing stop loss and trailing target functionality directly within regular order placement. Currently, users have to manually modify orders, which becomes difficult during fast market movements. Suggested features: - Trailing Stop Loss based on points or percentage - Trailing Target (profit lock-in as price moves favorably) - Ability to set both SL and Target together with trailing option - Applicable for intraday as well as delivery orders - Optional toggle inside bracket / GTT / regular orders This feature would significantly improve risk management and reduce the need for constant monitoring, especially for active traders. Many modern trading platforms already provide trailing exits, and having this in Kite would mak
The beat app for investing and trading

Hi Team, I would like to request a couple of improvements in the Stop Loss (SL) feature: 1. When updating the trigger price in an SL order, the limit price should automatically adjust. For example, if I set the trigger price to 150, the limit price should auto-update to 149.9. This will help reduce manual effort and save time. 2. Currently, if there is an active SL order, I am unable to exit my position directly. Please remove this dependency and allow users to exit positions anytime. Upon exiting, the related SL order should be automatically cancelled. This functionality is already available in Angel One and would greatly improve the trading experience on your platform. Thanks for considering this request.

Im a forty one year old man with a decent portfolio of about 50 lacs. However I find this app is very suspect. Sometimes orders don’t go through. Sometimes prices dip immediately by 1% upon purchasing. I think this is not a genuine app. Today I placed an order and it’s showing orders open and not executed. Means I’ve suffered a potential profit loss of about 20k to 30k … this is bizarre how this is so awful and no one ever talks of it.

I only use this app because I trade a lot and paying AMC on zerodha comes out to be lower overall per year than paying per trade on groww. But god, this app is so frustrating. The UI is not user friendly at all, and everything leads to a redirect to browser. Basic information isn’t displayed in orderly fashion, and basic features like history of cancelled orders are missing. If you have been using groww, using zerodha is like downgrading from an Audi to a kia. The QoL and the whole ecosystem is just worlds apart. The day groww implements an AmC option for frequent traders is the day I will dump zerodha. Even now I only use zerodha to book the trade, all the actual R&D is done on groww before hand and all my MF are on groww too. This company is so pretentious with all its “honest” marketing

I’ve used other brokers as well, never had to face this. When your money is at line, these things really cannot be excused. Also, the search bar not showing the stock just because you typed an alphabet incorrectly. It really costs a lot In a situation where speed is money

This is one of the most frustrating apps I’ve used. The system shows an error saying “your order could not be placed” even though the order actually goes through. This can easily lead to duplicate orders or complete confusion. To make things worse, customer support is no help. Instead of acknowledging a clear technical issue, they repeatedly ask for screenshots — as if users are expected to document every second of using the app just in case it breaks. The problem is on their end, yet the burden is pushed onto customers. An app that handles orders should at the very least be reliable and transparent. This one fails at the most basic functionality. Extremely disappointing experience. Needs serious technical fixes and much better support.

On high-volatility days (gap up/down, events, high volumes), the app frequently gets stuck or freezes. Orders fail, positions don’t update in real time, and retries often happen too late, causing real financial losses. A trading app’s first job is reliability — especially on event days. Unfortunately, this fails exactly when it matters most.

Zerodha trading app एक बेहतरीन और भरोसेमंद प्लेटफॉर्म है। इसका interface बहुत user-friendly है, जिससे नए और पुराने दोनों तरह के users आसानी से trading कर सकते हैं। App fast है, charts clear हैं और order place करना काफी simple है। सबसे बड़ी खासियत इसकी कम brokerage है, जिससे trading cost काफी कम हो जाती है और profit पर ज्यादा असर नहीं पड़ता। Equity delivery पर zero brokerage और intraday में fixed charge होना इसे बाकी apps से अलग बनाता है। इसके साथ ही Kite app की stability, real-time data और smooth performance trading experience को और बेहतर बनाती है। Overall, Zerodha एक safe, transparent और long-term trading ke liye best app है। ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
